requirements.title: Valid business registration
checks: SSM registration or equivalent business license is present
business name and address are identifiable
registration is not expired

requirements.title: Complete ingredient list with sources
checks: every menu item has its ingredients listed
each ingredient identifies its supplier or source
no obviously non-halal ingredient without justification

requirements.title: Supplier halal certificates for critical ingredients
checks: certificates exist for animal-derived and high-risk ingredients
certificates are issued by JAKIM or a JAKIM-recognized body
certificates are not expired
certificate scope covers the supplied items

requirements.title: Production flow chart with halal control points
checks: covers receiving, storage, preparation, and serving stages
includes cleaning or sanitization step
identifies halal critical control points

requirements.title: Documented halal policy
checks: policy states commitment to halal compliance
signed or endorsed by management
displayed or communicated to staff

requirements.title: Halal awareness training for key staff
checks: at least one staff member holds a halal training certificate
training is from a recognized provider
certificate is current

requirements.title: Active pest control program
checks: contract with a licensed pest control provider exists
contract period covers the application date

requirements.title: Premise cleanliness and segregation
checks: photos show clean preparation and storage areas
no visible non-halal items or cross-contamination risks
hand-washing facilities visible
